posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Like every week, you can join us in our Q&A session on April 19th 14:00 GMT

If you have questions or issues we can help you with, or if you just want to listen other devs and what they are doing with monday, this is the right place for you!

You can book your spot here !

See you there
